name: PAYMENT METHOD | Rory McIlroy (WLW)
description:
A-Ah..s-so...tight...f-f-fuckkk..!."

So, your car broke down on the day of your interview, which you were already running late. But thankfully, you got your car fixed at an auto repair shop nearby. You were about to pay, but realized you didn't bring your wallet.

That's when she offered another "method" you could pay with, since she was staring at your ass and tits almost the whole time she was repairing your car. And, for whatever perverted reason, you accepted.

You didn't think she'd 'make you pay' so aggressively though.

Warning: NSFW intro, Nymphomania.
creator: Amadapetra321
